zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Pelham於1537年出生在英國素可勞頓時，他的父親Sir Nicholas Pelham23歲，母親Anne Sackville17歲。他於1565年與Lady Judith Saint John在英國英格蘭貝德福爾布勒左結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1580年10月13日在英國倫敦享年43歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Pelham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Sussex): habitational name from Brent Pelham, Furneux Pelham, and Stocking Pelham in Hertfordshire, so called from the Old English personal name Pēola + hām ‘homestead’. Compare Pellham .

History: The manor of Pelham in Hertfordshire, England, was held by Walter de Pelham in the reign of Edward I (1272–1307). His descendants became constables of Pevensey Castle, Sussex, and were so influential that their badge, the buckle, is seen in at least eleven of the county's churches, and as a decoration on iron chimney-backs in Sussex farmhouses. Various branches of the family were ennobled and their titles include earl of Chichester and earl of Yarborough. The family also once held the dukedom of Newcastle and the marquessate of Clare. Peter Pelham (born c. 1695), an engraver, emigrated to Boston, MA, after 1728, and was stepfather to the artist John Singleton Copley.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Pelham was born in 1537, in Laughton, Sussex, England, his father, Sir Nicholas Pelham, was 23 and his mother, Anne Sackville, was 17. He married Lady Judith Saint John in 1565, in Bletsoe, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 13 October 1580, in London, England, at the age of 43, and was buried in London, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Pelham(이)가 1537년 영국 수세스 로그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Pelham(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Sackville(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1565년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 블레츠에서 Lady Judith Saint John(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1580년 10월 13일 영국 런던에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.
